resourceTemplates.name: facebook-ad-library-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search Facebook Ad Library
resourceTemplates.description: Searches the Facebook/Meta Ad Library by keyword. Supports filters such as `country`, `ad_type`, `active_status`, and pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-ad-library-ad-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook ad details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a specific Facebook Ad Library ad by `ad_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-ad-library-company-ads
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook company ads
resourceTemplates.description: Returns ads currently associated with a Facebook Ad Library company/page id. Supports pagination via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-ad-library-search-companies
resourceTemplates.title: Search Facebook Ad Library companies
resourceTemplates.description: Searches companies by name to find Facebook Ad Library page identifiers. Supports pagination with `cursor` when available.
